articles.title: Portrait of Presidency and General Board of the Relief Society Frontispiece
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages from January 1930 (Vol XVII, No. 1) including table of contents, advertisements, and a photograph of Scotty Anderson and his dog team. No portrait of the Relief Society Presidency and General Board is visible in these images. The images appear to be from a different issue than the June 1930 issue referenced in the table of contents.

articles.title: Relief Society Conference? Officers' Meeting, Morning Session
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 272-275, but the article listed on page 282 in the table of contents is not visible in these images. The images contain advertisements and other content, but not the missing conference article.

articles.title: Text Book for the Course in Literature.
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 345-348, but the article 'Text Book for the Course in Literature' is listed on page 337 in the table of contents. The images contain advertisements for Troy Laundry, Dr. Cannon's Soft Curd Baby Milk, and J.F. Boes jewelry, plus the magazine cover and contents page, but do not include page 337 where this article would be located.

articles.title: Presentation of Bathsheba W. Smith Portrait Kate M. Barker
articles.author: Kate M. Barker
articles.notes: The article is not present in any of the 4 provided PDF page images (pages 345-348). The article should be on page 338 according to the table of contents, but the provided images are from much later pages in the magazine.

articles.title: Relief Society Annual Report
articles.notes: The provided PDF images show pages 328-331, but the Relief Society Annual Report should be on page 339 according to the table of contents. The article is not visible in these particular page images.
